criteria.name: User problem understanding
criteria.description: Evidence of identifying user needs, pain points, or user segments.
evidence_required: User research, interview, survey, or problem framing
negative_signals: Jumps to solution without user context

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Product sense
criteria.description: Evidence of reasoning about product value, experience, and tradeoffs.
positive_signals: Connects feature choices to user or business goals

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: PRD or requirement documentation
criteria.description: Evidence of writing requirements, specs, user stories, or acceptance criteria.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Market or competitor research
criteria.description: Evidence of researching market context, competitors, or customer alternatives.
evidence_required: Market, competitor, or customer research task

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Prioritization
criteria.description: Evidence of choosing what to build or analyze first using constraints or criteria.
negative_signals: Claims ownership of roadmap without context

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Metrics thinking
criteria.description: Evidence of defining or using product metrics when supported by data.
positive_signals: Metric is tied to a product question
negative_signals: Invented metric movement or unsupported outcome

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Cross-functional collaboration
criteria.description: Evidence of working with design, engineering, data, business, or stakeholders.
positive_signals: Applicant role in collaboration is clear

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Prototype or MVP experience
criteria.description: Evidence of creating a prototype, MVP, wireframe, or experiment.
positive_signals: Prototype is connected to a user problem
negative_signals: Visual artifact with no problem or learning

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: AI/product analytics, action-result clarity, and truthfulness
criteria.description: Uses AI or analytics claims only with clear evidence and keeps product bullets action-result oriented.
negative_signals: Unsupported product impact or invented adoption metrics

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

notes: Static v0 profile with manually curated public role-fit indicators. It does not represent private employer rules.
